metadata.name: int_pendo__guide_alltime_metrics
metadata.comment: This model calculates alltime metrics for guides. This is is necessary as different kinds of guide events are tracked (whereas only clicks are tracked for features, and views for pages). Thus, we are dynamically pivoting out different event type metrics, and need  to store this in a model file (instead of a CTE in `pendo__guide`) in order to use `dbt_utils.star()`

metadata.name: pendo__account
metadata.comment: Table capturing accounts - their latest state enhanced with metrics. Includes any custom columns  passed through via the `pendo__account_history_pass_through_columns` variable.

last_updated_at.name: last_updated_at
last_updated_at.comment: The timestamp (UTC) of when the account was last updated.

first_visit_at.name: first_visit_at
first_visit_at.comment: The timestamp (UTC) of when the account or visitor was created.

last_visit_at.name: last_visit_at
last_visit_at.comment: The timestamp (UTC) of when Pendo last recorded an event for the account.

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: UTC timestamp that indicates the time when Fivetran last successfully synced the row.

count_associated_visitors.name: count_associated_visitors
count_associated_visitors.comment: Count of visitors associated with the accounts, based on `int_pendo__latest_visitor_account`.

min_nps_rating.name: min_nps_rating
min_nps_rating.comment: Of associated visitors' most recent NPS ratings, the minimum rating.

max_nps_rating.name: max_nps_rating
max_nps_rating.comment: Of associated visitors' most recent NPS ratings, the maximum rating.

avg_nps_rating.name: avg_nps_rating
avg_nps_rating.comment: Of associated visitors' most recent NPS ratings, the average rating.

count_active_visitors.name: count_active_visitors
count_active_visitors.comment: Count of visitors who have triggered any kind of event in Pendo.

count_page_viewing_visitors.name: count_page_viewing_visitors
count_page_viewing_visitors.comment: Count of visitors who have performed a page event.

count_feature_clicking_visitors.name: count_feature_clicking_visitors
count_feature_clicking_visitors.comment: Count of visitors who have performed a feature event.

count_active_days.name: count_active_days
count_active_days.comment: Count of calendar days on which events were tracked for this account.

count_active_months.name: count_active_months
count_active_months.comment: Count of calendar months on which events were tracked for this account.

sum_minutes.name: sum_minutes
sum_minutes.comment: Total time, in minutes, of logged event activity for this account (based on `event.num_minutes`).

sum_events.name: sum_events
sum_events.comment: Total number of tracked events for this account (based on `event.num_events`)

count_event_records.name: count_event_records
count_event_records.comment: Count of records in the `EVENT` table logged for this account.

average_daily_minutes.name: average_daily_minutes
average_daily_minutes.comment: Average minutes logged per day for the account (excluding days with 0 events).

average_daily_events.name: average_daily_events
average_daily_events.comment: Average events logged per day for the account (excluding days with 0 events).

first_event_on.name: first_event_on
first_event_on.comment: Date on which the first event was tracked for this account.

last_event_on.name: last_event_on
last_event_on.comment: Date on which the last event was tracked for this account.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: pendo__account_daily_metrics
metadata.comment: Table capturing daily event metrics for tracked accounts, from the day that ane event was first tracked for this account to the current date.

date_day.name: date_day
date_day.comment: Day for which these metrics were calculated.

count_active_visitors.name: count_active_visitors
count_active_visitors.comment: Count of visitors who have triggered any kind of event in Pendo on this day.

sum_minutes.name: sum_minutes
sum_minutes.comment: Total daily time, in minutes, of logged event activity for this account (based on `event.num_minutes`).

sum_events.name: sum_events
sum_events.comment: Total daily number of tracked events for this account (based on `event.num_events`)

count_event_records.name: count_event_records
count_event_records.comment: Count of records in the `EVENT` table logged for this account on this day.

count_pages_viewed.name: count_pages_viewed
count_pages_viewed.comment: Count of distinct pages viewed by this account.

count_features_clicked.name: count_features_clicked
count_features_clicked.comment: Count of distinct features clicked by this account.

count_page_viewing_visitors.name: count_page_viewing_visitors
count_page_viewing_visitors.comment: Count of distinct visitors who triggered pageview events under this account.

count_feature_clicking_visitors.name: count_feature_clicking_visitors
count_feature_clicking_visitors.comment: Count of distinct visitors who triggered feature-click events under this account.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: pendo__feature
metadata.comment: Table capturing features - their latest state enhanced with metrics and relational information.

app_id.name: app_id
app_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `APPLICATION` that the feature is a part of.

created_at.name: created_at
created_at.comment: Timestamp of when the feature was created.

created_by_user_id.name: created_by_user_id
created_by_user_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `USER` that created the feature.

is_dirty.name: is_dirty
is_dirty.comment: Boolean value returned if feature is processing at the time of request.

group_id.name: group_id
group_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `GROUP` (product area) that the feature is tagged under.

is_core_event.name: is_core_event
is_core_event.comment: Boolean that is true if the feature is tagged as a core event/key feature of the product.

last_updated_at.name: last_updated_at
last_updated_at.comment: Timestamp of when the feature was last updated.

last_updated_by_user_id.name: last_updated_by_user_id
last_updated_by_user_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `USER` that last updated the feature.

page_id.name: page_id
page_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `PAGE` that the feature is placed on.

root_version_id.name: root_version_id
root_version_id.comment: The unique identifier of the root entity, which nominally matches the public id field of the feature.

stable_version_id.name: stable_version_id
stable_version_id.comment: The unique identifier for the current version of the feature.

valid_through.name: valid_through
valid_through.comment: Timestamp that indicates when data was last processed.

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: UTC timestamp that indicates the time when Fivetran last successfully synced the row.

product_area_name.name: product_area_name
product_area_name.comment: Name of the product area (ie `GROUP`) that the feature is tagged under.

page_name.name: page_name
page_name.comment: Name of the page that the feature lives on.

page_created_at.name: page_created_at
page_created_at.comment: Timestamp of when the feature's page was created.

page_valid_through.name: page_valid_through
page_valid_through.comment: Timestamp that indicates when data was last processed for the feature's page.

app_display_name.name: app_display_name
app_display_name.comment: Display name of the application that the feature is a part of.

app_platform.name: app_platform
app_platform.comment: Platform on which the feature's application is served.

created_by_user_full_name.name: created_by_user_full_name
created_by_user_full_name.comment: Full name of the internal user who first created the feature.

created_by_user_username.name: created_by_user_username
created_by_user_username.comment: Username (probably email) of the internal user who first created the feature.

last_updated_by_user_full_name.name: last_updated_by_user_full_name
last_updated_by_user_full_name.comment: Full name of the internal user who last updated the feature.

last_updated_by_user_username.name: last_updated_by_user_username
last_updated_by_user_username.comment: Username (probably email) of the internal user who last updated the feature.

count_visitors.name: count_visitors
count_visitors.comment: Count of distinct visitors who have clicked on this feature.

count_accounts.name: count_accounts
count_accounts.comment: Count of distinct accounts who have been tracked clicking this feature.

sum_clicks.name: sum_clicks
sum_clicks.comment: The total sum of click interactions with this feature (based on `num_events`).

count_click_events.name: count_click_events
count_click_events.comment: Count of records in `feature_event` logged for this feature.

first_click_at.name: first_click_at
first_click_at.comment: Timestamp of when a visitor first clicked on this feature.

last_click_at.name: last_click_at
last_click_at.comment: Timestamp of when a visitor last clicked on this feature.

avg_visitor_minutes.name: avg_visitor_minutes
avg_visitor_minutes.comment: Average total time spent on this feature per visitor (ignoring 0-event visitors).

avg_visitor_events.name: avg_visitor_events
avg_visitor_events.comment: Average sum of feature click events per visitor (ignoring 0-event visitors).

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: pendo__feature_daily_metrics
metadata.comment: Table capturing daily event metrics for tracked features, from the day that the feature was created to either it's `valid_through` date or the date of its last tracked event (whichever is later).

date_day.name: date_day
date_day.comment: Day for which these metrics were calculated.

group_id.name: group_id
group_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `GROUP` (product area) that the feature is tagged under.

product_area_name.name: product_area_name
product_area_name.comment: Name of the product area (ie `GROUP`) that the feature is tagged under.

page_id.name: page_id
page_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `PAGE` that the feature is placed on.

page_name.name: page_name
page_name.comment: Name of the page that the feature lives on.

sum_clicks.name: sum_clicks
sum_clicks.comment: Total daily number of tracked clicks (based on `event.num_events`)

count_visitors.name: count_visitors
count_visitors.comment: Count of distinct visitors who clicked on the feature on this day.

count_accounts.name: count_accounts
count_accounts.comment: Count of distinct accounts that were logged in `feature_event` on this day.

count_first_time_visitors.name: count_first_time_visitors
count_first_time_visitors.comment: Count of visitors for whom their first interaction with the feature was on this day.

count_first_time_accounts.name: count_first_time_accounts
count_first_time_accounts.comment: Count of accounts for whom their first interaction with the feature was on this day.

count_return_visitors.name: count_return_visitors
count_return_visitors.comment: Count of visitors who clicked on the feature prior to this day as well.

count_return_accounts.name: count_return_accounts
count_return_accounts.comment: Count of accounts who clicked on the feature prior to this day as well.

avg_daily_minutes_per_visitor.name: avg_daily_minutes_per_visitor
avg_daily_minutes_per_visitor.comment: For the day, the average time spent interacting with the feature per visitor.

avg_daily_clicks_per_visitor.name: avg_daily_clicks_per_visitor
avg_daily_clicks_per_visitor.comment: For the day, the average sum of clicks per visitor.

percent_of_daily_feature_clicks.name: percent_of_daily_feature_clicks
percent_of_daily_feature_clicks.comment: Relative to the total number of clicks on ALL features, the percentage that were clicks on this feature.

percent_of_daily_feature_visitors.name: percent_of_daily_feature_visitors
percent_of_daily_feature_visitors.comment: Relative to the total number of visitors clicking on ALL features, the percentage that were visitors clicking on this feature.

percent_of_daily_feature_accounts.name: percent_of_daily_feature_accounts
percent_of_daily_feature_accounts.comment: Relative to the total number of accounts clicking on ALL features, the percentage that were accounts clicking on this feature.

count_click_events.name: count_click_events
count_click_events.comment: Count of records in `feature_event` for this feature on this day.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: pendo__feature_event
metadata.comment: Table capturing all recorded click events matching tagged features. Contains custom columns passed through via the `pendo__feature_event_pass_through_columns`, as well as any `visitor` and `account` custom columns.

account_id.name: account_id
account_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `ACCOUNT` associated with the event, if any.

app_id.name: app_id
app_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `APPLICATION` that the event was tracked in.

feature_id.name: feature_id
feature_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `FEATURE` that the event is tagged with.

num_events.name: num_events
num_events.comment: Number of feature events tracked for this unique combination of day/hour, visitorId, accountId, server name, and IP address.

num_minutes.name: num_minutes
num_minutes.comment: Number of feature events minutes tracked for this unique combination of day/hour, visitorId, accountId, server name, and IP address.

remote_ip.name: remote_ip
remote_ip.comment: The IP address of the event triggerer.

server_name.name: server_name
server_name.comment: Name of the server (your website) on which the event was tracked.

occurred_at.name: occurred_at
occurred_at.comment: Day/hour-part timestamp of when the event occurred.

user_agent.name: user_agent
user_agent.comment: String identifying the browser and operating system on which the event was triggered.

visitor_id.name: visitor_id
visitor_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `VISITOR` who triggered the event.

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: UTC timestamp that indicates the time when Fivetran last successfully synced the row.

_fivetran_id.name: _fivetran_id
_fivetran_id.comment: Fivetran created id hashed on the `property_*` and `param_*` fields.

previous_feature_id.name: previous_feature_id
previous_feature_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `feature` that the visitor previously interacted with.

previous_feature_event_at.name: previous_feature_event_at
previous_feature_event_at.comment: Timestamp of the previous time the visitor interacted with a feature.

previous_feature_num_minutes.name: previous_feature_num_minutes
previous_feature_num_minutes.comment: The time logged for the visitor's previous interaction with a feature.

previous_feature_num_events.name: previous_feature_num_events
previous_feature_num_events.comment: The number of clicks logged for the visitor's previous interaction with a feature.

page_id.name: page_id
page_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `PAGE` that the feature is placed on.

page_name.name: page_name
page_name.comment: Name of the page that the feature lives on.

product_area_name.name: product_area_name
product_area_name.comment: Name of the product area (ie `GROUP`) that the feature is tagged under.

product_area_id.name: product_area_id
product_area_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `GROUP` (product area) that the feature is tagged under.

app_display_name.name: app_display_name
app_display_name.comment: Display name of the application that the feature is a part of.

app_platform.name: app_platform
app_platform.comment: Platform on which the feature's application is served.

previous_feature_name.name: previous_feature_name
previous_feature_name.comment: Name of the previous feature the visitor interacted with.

previous_feature_page_id.name: previous_feature_page_id
previous_feature_page_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `page` of the feature that the visitor previously interacted with.

previous_feature_page_name.name: previous_feature_page_name
previous_feature_page_name.comment: Name of the page housing the feature that the visitor previously interacted with.

previous_feature_product_area_name.name: previous_feature_product_area_name
previous_feature_product_area_name.comment: Name of the product area (group) that the visitor's previous feature is tagged under.

previous_feature_product_area_id.name: previous_feature_product_area_id
previous_feature_product_area_id.comment: Foreign key reference to the product area (group) that the visitor's previous feature is tagged under.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: pendo__guide
metadata.comment: Table capturing guides - their latest state enhanced with metrics and relational information. Pendo tracks a variety of events around guides, and event-type-specific visitor-count-metrics are dynamically pivoted out in this table.

app_id.name: app_id
app_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `APPLICATION` that the guide belongs in.

state.name: state
state.comment: The current state of the guide. published, staged, draft, and disabled.

device_type.name: device_type
device_type.comment: The current state of the guide - 'all', 'desktop', 'mobile'.

created_at.name: created_at
created_at.comment: Timestamp of when the guide was created.

created_by_user_id.name: created_by_user_id
created_by_user_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `USER` who created the guide.

is_multi_step.name: is_multi_step
is_multi_step.comment: Returns true if guide has multiple steps (walkthrough).

is_training.name: is_training
is_training.comment: Boolean that is true if the guide is for training.

last_updated_at.name: last_updated_at
last_updated_at.comment: Timestamp of when the guide was last updated.

last_updated_by_user_id.name: last_updated_by_user_id
last_updated_by_user_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `USER` who last updated the guide.

launch_method.name: launch_method
launch_method.comment: Activation method of the guide (ie auto, badge, dom).

published_at.name: published_at
published_at.comment: Timestamp of when the guide was officially published.

recurrence.name: recurrence
recurrence.comment: How frequent the guide is scheduled to recur.

recurrence_eligibility_window.name: recurrence_eligibility_window
recurrence_eligibility_window.comment: Eligible interval in which guides can be repeatedly activated.

reset_at.name: reset_at
reset_at.comment: Timestamp of when the guide was reset for visitors.

root_version_id.name: root_version_id
root_version_id.comment: The unique identifier of the root entity, which nominally matches the public id field of the guide.

stable_version_id.name: stable_version_id
stable_version_id.comment: The unique identifier for the current version of the feature.

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: UTC timestamp that indicates the time when Fivetran last successfully synced the row.

app_display_name.name: app_display_name
app_display_name.comment: Display name of the application that the guide is a part of.

app_platform.name: app_platform
app_platform.comment: Platform on which the guide's application is served.

created_by_user_full_name.name: created_by_user_full_name
created_by_user_full_name.comment: Full name of the internal user who first created the guide.

created_by_user_username.name: created_by_user_username
created_by_user_username.comment: Username (probably email) of the internal user who first created the guide.

last_updated_by_user_full_name.name: last_updated_by_user_full_name
last_updated_by_user_full_name.comment: Full name of the internal user who last updated the guide.

last_updated_by_user_username.name: last_updated_by_user_username
last_updated_by_user_username.comment: Username (probably email) of the internal user who last updated the guide.

count_steps.name: count_steps
count_steps.comment: Number of steps that visitors must navigate to complete the guide.

count_visitors.name: count_visitors
count_visitors.comment: Count of visitors who have interacted with the guide.

count_accounts.name: count_accounts
count_accounts.comment: Count of accounts who have been tracked interacting with the guide.

count_events.name: count_events
count_events.comment: Count of records in `guide_event` for this guide.

first_event_at.name: first_event_at
first_event_at.comment: Timestamp of when the guide was first interacted with.

last_event_at.name: last_event_at
last_event_at.comment: Timestamp of when the guide was last interacted with.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: pendo__guide_daily_metrics
metadata.comment: Table capturing daily event metrics for tracked features, from the day that the feature was created to the current date. Pendo tracks a variety of events around guides, and event-type-specific visitor-count-metrics are dynamically pivoted out in this table.

date_day.name: date_day
date_day.comment: Day for which these metrics were calculated.

count_visitors.name: count_visitors
count_visitors.comment: Count of visitors interacting with the guide on this day.

count_accounts.name: count_accounts
count_accounts.comment: Count of accounts interacting with the guide on this day.

count_guide_events.name: count_guide_events
count_guide_events.comment: Count of records in `guide_event` for this guide on this day.

count_first_time_visitors.name: count_first_time_visitors
count_first_time_visitors.comment: Count of visitors interacting with the guide for the first time on this day.

count_first_time_accounts.name: count_first_time_accounts
count_first_time_accounts.comment: Count of accounts interacting with the guide for the first time on this day.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: pendo__guide_event
metadata.comment: Table capturing various types of events related to guide interactions. Contains any `visitor` and `account` custom columns.

account_id.name: account_id
account_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `ACCOUNT` associated with the event triggerer, if any.

app_id.name: app_id
app_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `APPLICATION` the event was triggered in.

country.name: country
country.comment: Country in which the guide event was recorded.

guide_id.name: guide_id
guide_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `GUIDE` that was interacted with.

guide_step_id.name: guide_step_id
guide_step_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `STEP` within the guide that was interacted with specifically.

latitude.name: latitude
latitude.comment: Latitude of where the event was triggered from, if location is provided.

longitude.name: longitude
longitude.comment: Longitude of where the event was triggered from, if location is provided.

region.name: region
region.comment: Geographic region of the triggered event, if location is provided.

remote_ip.name: remote_ip
remote_ip.comment: IP Address of the event triggerer.

server_name.name: server_name
server_name.comment: Name of the server (your website) on which the event was tracked.

occurred_at.name: occurred_at
occurred_at.comment: Timestamp of when the event occurred.

type.name: type
type.comment: Type of guide event that was tracked. Can be one of `guideAdvanced`, `guideSeen`, `guideDismissed`, `guideSnoozed`, `guideTimeout`, `guideActivity`.

url.name: url
url.comment: URL on which the guide event was recorded.

user_agent.name: user_agent
user_agent.comment: String identifying the browser and operating system on which the event was triggered.

visitor_id.name: visitor_id
visitor_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `VISITOR` who triggered the event.

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: UTC timestamp that indicates the time when Fivetran last successfully synced the row.

app_display_name.name: app_display_name
app_display_name.comment: Display name of the application that the guide is a part of.

app_platform.name: app_platform
app_platform.comment: Platform on which the guide's application is served.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: pendo__page
metadata.comment: Table capturing pages - their latest state enhanced with metrics and relational information.

page_name.name: page_name
page_name.comment: Name of the page as displayed in Pendo.

app_id.name: app_id
app_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `APPLICATION` that the page is associated with.

created_at.name: created_at
created_at.comment: Timestamp of when the page was first created.

created_by_user_id.name: created_by_user_id
created_by_user_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `USER` who created the page.

is_dirty.name: is_dirty
is_dirty.comment: Boolean value returned if page is processing at the time of request.

group_id.name: group_id
group_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `GROUP` (product area) that the page is tagged under.

last_updated_at.name: last_updated_at
last_updated_at.comment: Timestamp of when the page was updated.

last_updated_by_user_id.name: last_updated_by_user_id
last_updated_by_user_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `USER` who last updated the page.

root_version_id.name: root_version_id
root_version_id.comment: The unique identifier of the root entity, which nominally matches the public id field of the page.

stable_version_id.name: stable_version_id
stable_version_id.comment: The unique identifier for the current version of the page.

valid_through.name: valid_through
valid_through.comment: Timestamp that indicates when data was last processed.

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: UTC timestamp that indicates the time when Fivetran last successfully synced the row.

rules.name: rules
rules.comment: Comma-separated list of the bare-bones URL rules of the page.

product_area_name.name: product_area_name
product_area_name.comment: Name of the product area (ie `GROUP`) that the page is tagged under.

app_display_name.name: app_display_name
app_display_name.comment: Display name of the application that the page is a part of.

app_platform.name: app_platform
app_platform.comment: Platform on which the page's application is served.

created_by_user_full_name.name: created_by_user_full_name
created_by_user_full_name.comment: Full name of the internal user who first created the page.

created_by_user_username.name: created_by_user_username
created_by_user_username.comment: Username (probably email) of the internal user who first created the page.

last_updated_by_user_full_name.name: last_updated_by_user_full_name
last_updated_by_user_full_name.comment: Full name of the internal user who last updated the page.

last_updated_by_user_username.name: last_updated_by_user_username
last_updated_by_user_username.comment: Username (probably email) of the internal user who last updated the page.

count_active_features.name: count_active_features
count_active_features.comment: Count of currently-active features (defined by their `valid_through`) that live on this page.

count_visitors.name: count_visitors
count_visitors.comment: Total count of visitors who have viewed this page.

count_accounts.name: count_accounts
count_accounts.comment: Total count of accounts who have been tracked viewing this page.

sum_pageviews.name: sum_pageviews
sum_pageviews.comment: The total sum of pageview interactions with this page (based on `num_events`).

count_pageview_events.name: count_pageview_events
count_pageview_events.comment: Count of records in `page_event` logged for this page.

first_pageview_at.name: first_pageview_at
first_pageview_at.comment: Timestamp of when this page was first viewed by a visitor.

last_pageview_at.name: last_pageview_at
last_pageview_at.comment: Timestamp of when this page was last viewed by a visitor.

avg_visitor_minutes.name: avg_visitor_minutes
avg_visitor_minutes.comment: Average total time spent on this page per visitor (ignoring 0-event visitors).

avg_visitor_pageviews.name: avg_visitor_pageviews
avg_visitor_pageviews.comment: Average sum of pageview events per visitor (ignoring 0-event visitors).

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: pendo__page_daily_metrics
metadata.comment: Table capturing daily event metrics for tracked pages, from the day that the feature was created to either it's `valid_through` date or the date of its last tracked event (whichever is later).

date_day.name: date_day
date_day.comment: Day for which these metrics were calculated.

group_id.name: group_id
group_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `GROUP` (product area) that the page is tagged under.

product_area_name.name: product_area_name
product_area_name.comment: Name of the product area (ie `GROUP`) that the page is tagged under.

sum_pageviews.name: sum_pageviews
sum_pageviews.comment: Total daily number of tracked views (based on `event.num_events`)

count_visitors.name: count_visitors
count_visitors.comment: Count of distinct visitors who viewed on the page on this day.

count_accounts.name: count_accounts
count_accounts.comment: Count of distinct accounts that were logged in `page_event` on this day.

count_first_time_visitors.name: count_first_time_visitors
count_first_time_visitors.comment: Count of visitors for whom their first interaction with the page was on this day.

count_first_time_accounts.name: count_first_time_accounts
count_first_time_accounts.comment: Count of accounts for whom their first interaction with the page was on this day.

count_return_visitors.name: count_return_visitors
count_return_visitors.comment: Count of visitors who clicked on the page prior to this day as well.

count_return_accounts.name: count_return_accounts
count_return_accounts.comment: Count of accounts who clicked on the page prior to this day as well.

avg_daily_minutes_per_visitor.name: avg_daily_minutes_per_visitor
avg_daily_minutes_per_visitor.comment: For the day, the average time spent viewing the page per visitor.

avg_daily_pageviews_per_visitor.name: avg_daily_pageviews_per_visitor
avg_daily_pageviews_per_visitor.comment: For the day, the average sum of pageviews per visitor.

percent_of_daily_pageviews.name: percent_of_daily_pageviews
percent_of_daily_pageviews.comment: Relative to the total number of views of ALL pages, the percentage that were views on this page.

percent_of_daily_page_visitors.name: percent_of_daily_page_visitors
percent_of_daily_page_visitors.comment: Relative to the total number of visitors viewing ALL pages, the percentage that were visitors viewing this page.

percent_of_daily_page_accounts.name: percent_of_daily_page_accounts
percent_of_daily_page_accounts.comment: Relative to the total number of accounts viewing ALL pages, the percentage that were accounts viewing this page.

count_pageview_events.name: count_pageview_events
count_pageview_events.comment: Count of records in `page_event` for this page on this day.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: pendo__page_event
metadata.comment: Table capturing all recorded pageviews matching tagged pages. Contains custom columns passed through the `pendo__page_event_pass_through_columns` variable, as well as any custom `visitor` and `account` columns.

account_id.name: account_id
account_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `ACCOUNT` associated with the event, if any.

app_id.name: app_id
app_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `APPLICATION` that the event was tracked in.

num_events.name: num_events
num_events.comment: Number of pageviews matching tagged pages.

num_minutes.name: num_minutes
num_minutes.comment: Page time on site calculations are in 1 minute buckets. So if you are logged in to your app as a user (Pendo Visitor)  when you load a page’s URL, 1 minute time on site is calculated. Every time you click on that page, the time on site  calculation keeps running and totaling the successive minutes you’ve spent on that page. See https://support.pendo.io/hc/en-us/articles/360032203171-How-is-Site-Page-Interaction-Calculated-.

page_id.name: page_id
page_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `PAGE` being loaded.

remote_ip.name: remote_ip
remote_ip.comment: The IP address of the event triggerer.

server_name.name: server_name
server_name.comment: Name of the server (your website) on which the event was tracked.

occurred_at.name: occurred_at
occurred_at.comment: Day/hour-part timestamp of when the event occurred.

user_agent.name: user_agent
user_agent.comment: String identifying the browser and operating system on which the event was triggered.

visitor_id.name: visitor_id
visitor_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `VISITOR` who triggered the event.

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: UTC timestamp that indicates the time when Fivetran last successfully synced the row.

_fivetran_id.name: _fivetran_id
_fivetran_id.comment: Fivetran created id hashed on the `param_*` fields.

previous_page_id.name: previous_page_id
previous_page_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `page` that the visitor previously interacted with.

previous_page_event_at.name: previous_page_event_at
previous_page_event_at.comment: Timestamp of the previous time the visitor interacted with a page.

previous_page_num_minutes.name: previous_page_num_minutes
previous_page_num_minutes.comment: The time logged for the visitor's previous interaction with a page.

previous_page_num_events.name: previous_page_num_events
previous_page_num_events.comment: The number of views logged for the visitor's previous interaction with a page.

page_name.name: page_name
page_name.comment: Name of the page that was viewed.

page_rules.name: page_rules
page_rules.comment: Comma-separated list of the bare-bones URL rules of the page.

product_area_name.name: product_area_name
product_area_name.comment: Name of the product area (ie `GROUP`) that the page is tagged under.

product_area_id.name: product_area_id
product_area_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `GROUP` (product area) that the page is tagged under.

app_display_name.name: app_display_name
app_display_name.comment: Display name of the application that the page is a part of.

app_platform.name: app_platform
app_platform.comment: Platform on which the page's application is served.

previous_page_name.name: previous_page_name
previous_page_name.comment: Name of the page that the visitor previously loaded.

previous_product_area_name.name: previous_product_area_name
previous_product_area_name.comment: Name of the product area (group) that the visitor's previous page is tagged under.

previous_page_product_area_id.name: previous_page_product_area_id
previous_page_product_area_id.comment: Foreign key reference to the product area (group) that the visitor's previous page is tagged under.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: pendo__visitor
metadata.comment: Table capturing individual visitors - their latest state enhanced with metrics. Includes any custom columns passed through via the `pendo__account_history_pass_through_columns` variable.

account_id.name: account_id
account_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `ACCOUNT` associated with this visitor. Visitors can belong to multiple accounts, however. Refer to `VISITOR_ACCOUNT_HISTORY` for all accounts associated with individual visitors.

first_visit_at.name: first_visit_at
first_visit_at.comment: Timestamp of when an event was first captured for the visitor.

last_updated_at.name: last_updated_at
last_updated_at.comment: Timestamp of when the visitor was last updated.

last_visit.name: last_visit
last_visit.comment: Timestamp of the user's last visit.

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: UTC timestamp that indicates the time when Fivetran last successfully synced the row.

count_associated_accounts.name: count_associated_accounts
count_associated_accounts.comment: Count of accounts currently associated with the visitor.

latest_nps_rating.name: latest_nps_rating
latest_nps_rating.comment: The latest NPS rating that the visitor submitted via a poll.

count_active_days.name: count_active_days
count_active_days.comment: Count of calendar days on which events were tracked for this visitor.

count_active_months.name: count_active_months
count_active_months.comment: Count of calendar months on which events were tracked for this visitor.

sum_minutes.name: sum_minutes
sum_minutes.comment: Total time, in minutes, of logged event activity for this visitor (based on `event.num_minutes`).

sum_events.name: sum_events
sum_events.comment: Total number of tracked events for this visitor (based on `event.num_events`)

count_event_records.name: count_event_records
count_event_records.comment: Count of records in the `EVENT` table logged for this visitor.

average_daily_minutes.name: average_daily_minutes
average_daily_minutes.comment: Of days on which they were active, the average total daily tracked time.

average_daily_events.name: average_daily_events
average_daily_events.comment: Of days on which they were active, the average total daily sum of events.

first_event_on.name: first_event_on
first_event_on.comment: Date on which the first event was tracked for this visitor.

last_event_on.name: last_event_on
last_event_on.comment: Date on which the last event was tracked for this visitor.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: pendo__visitor_daily_metrics
metadata.comment: Table capturing daily event metrics for tracked visitors, from the day that ane event was first tracked for this visitor to the current date.

date_day.name: date_day
date_day.comment: Day for which these metrics were calculated.

sum_minutes.name: sum_minutes
sum_minutes.comment: Total daily time, in minutes, of logged event activity for this visitor (based on `event.num_minutes`).

sum_events.name: sum_events
sum_events.comment: Total daily number of tracked events for this visitor (based on `event.num_events`)

count_event_records.name: count_event_records
count_event_records.comment: Count of records in the `EVENT` table logged for this visitor on this day.

count_pages_viewed.name: count_pages_viewed
count_pages_viewed.comment: Count of distinct pages viewed by this visitor on this day.

count_features_clicked.name: count_features_clicked
count_features_clicked.comment: Count of distinct features clicked by this visitor on this day.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: pendo__visitor_feature
metadata.comment: Table aggregating interactions between individual users and features. Visitor-feature combinations without any interactions to date do not appear here.

visitor_id.name: visitor_id
visitor_id.comment: Foreign key reference to the `visitor` interacting with the feature.

feature_id.name: feature_id
feature_id.comment: Foreign key reference to the `feature` being clicked on.

product_area_id.name: product_area_id
product_area_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `GROUP` (product area) that the feature is tagged under.

product_area_name.name: product_area_name
product_area_name.comment: Name of the product area (ie `GROUP`) that the feature is tagged under.

first_click_at.name: first_click_at
first_click_at.comment: Timestamp of the first time the visitor clicked on the feature.

last_click_at.name: last_click_at
last_click_at.comment: Timestamp of the last time the visitor clicked on the feature.

sum_clicks.name: sum_clicks
sum_clicks.comment: The total sum of click interactions between the visitor and this feature (based on `num_events`).

sum_minutes.name: sum_minutes
sum_minutes.comment: The total interaction time between the visitor and this feature (based on `num_minutes`).

avg_daily_minutes.name: avg_daily_minutes
avg_daily_minutes.comment: Of the visitors' active days, the average total daily time spent interacting with the feature.

count_active_days.name: count_active_days
count_active_days.comment: The count of days in which the visitor interacted with the feature.

count_click_events.name: count_click_events
count_click_events.comment: Count of records in `feature_event` logged between the visitor and the feature.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_pendo__account_history
metadata.comment: Table capturing the historical records of each account utilizing your product via Pendo.  Note that this table may contain custom metadata columns which can be passed through via `pendo__account_history_pass_through_columns`.

last_updated_at.name: last_updated_at
last_updated_at.comment: The timestamp (UTC) of when the account was last updated.

first_visit_at.name: first_visit_at
first_visit_at.comment: The timestamp (UTC) of when the account or visitor was created.

last_visit_at.name: last_visit_at
last_visit_at.comment: The timestamp (UTC) of when Pendo last recorded an event for the account.

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: UTC timestamp that indicates the time when Fivetran last successfully synced the row.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_pendo__application_history
metadata.comment: Table capturing changes to your tracked application(s).

created_at.name: created_at
created_at.comment: Timestamp of when the application version record was created.

created_by_user_id.name: created_by_user_id
created_by_user_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `USER` who created the application.

event_count.name: event_count
event_count.comment: Count of events tracked in this application.

first_event_at.name: first_event_at
first_event_at.comment: Timestamp of when the first event was tracked for this application.

is_integrated.name: is_integrated
is_integrated.comment: Boolean that is true if the app is integrated.

is_deleted.name: is_deleted
is_deleted.comment: Boolean that is true if the app version is deleted.

last_updated_at.name: last_updated_at
last_updated_at.comment: Timestamp of when the app was last updated.

last_updated_by_user_id.name: last_updated_by_user_id
last_updated_by_user_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `USER` who last updated the app.

platform.name: platform
platform.comment: Platform on which the application is served.

subscription_id.name: subscription_id
subscription_id.comment: ID of the app's Pendo subscription.

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: UTC timestamp that indicates the time when Fivetran last successfully synced the row.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_pendo__event
metadata.comment: Table capturing all recorded click and pageview events (tagged or untagged). May contain custom columns passed through via the `pendo__event_pass_through_columns` variable.

visitor_id.name: visitor_id
visitor_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `VISITOR` who triggered the event.

account_id.name: account_id
account_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `ACCOUNT` associated with the event, if any.

app_id.name: app_id
app_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `APPLICATION` that the event was tracked in.

page_id.name: page_id
page_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `PAGE` that the event occurred on.

remote_ip.name: remote_ip
remote_ip.comment: The IP address of the event triggerer.

server_name.name: server_name
server_name.comment: Name of the server (your website) on which the event was tracked.

occurred_at.name: occurred_at
occurred_at.comment: Day/hour-part timestamp of when the event occurred.

user_agent.name: user_agent
user_agent.comment: String identifying the browser and operating system on which the event was triggered.

num_events.name: num_events
num_events.comment: Number of events tracked for this unique combination of day/hour, visitorId, accountId, server name, and IP address.

num_minutes.name: num_minutes
num_minutes.comment: Number of unique minutes of activity tracked for this unique combination of day/hour, visitorId, accountId, server name, and IP address.

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: UTC timestamp that indicates the time when Fivetran last successfully synced the row.

_fivetran_id.name: _fivetran_id
_fivetran_id.comment: Fivetran created id hashed on the `property_*` and `param_*` fields.

has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

app_id.name: app_id

feature_id.name: feature_id

num_events.name: num_events
num_events.comment: Number of feature events tracked for this unique combination of day/hour, visitorId, accountId, server name, and IP address.

num_minutes.name: num_minutes
num_minutes.comment: Number of feature events minutes tracked for this unique combination of day/hour, visitorId, accountId, server name, and IP address.

remote_ip.name: remote_ip
remote_ip.comment: The IP address of the event triggerer.

server_name.name: server_name
server_name.comment: Name of the server (your website) on which the event was tracked.

occurred_at.name: occurred_at
occurred_at.comment: Day/hour-part timestamp of when the event occurred.

user_agent.name: user_agent
user_agent.comment: String identifying the browser and operating system on which the event was triggered.

visitor_id.name: visitor_id
visitor_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `VISITOR` who triggered the event.

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: UTC timestamp that indicates the time when Fivetran last successfully synced the row.

_fivetran_id.name: _fivetran_id
_fivetran_id.comment: Fivetran created id hashed on the `property_*` and `param_*` fields.

created_by_user_id.name: created_by_user_id

last_updated_by_user_id.name: last_updated_by_user_id

page_id.name: page_id

root_version_id.name: root_version_id
root_version_id.comment: The unique identifier of the root entity, which nominally matches the public id field of the feature.

stable_version_id.name: stable_version_id

valid_through.name: valid_through

metadata.comment: Table capturing the product areas (groups) that pages and features can be tagged with.

group_id.name: group_id

app_id.name: app_id
app_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `APPLICATION` that the product area lives in.

created_at.name: created_at

created_by_user_id.name: created_by_user_id
created_by_user_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `USER` who created the product area.

last_updated_at.name: last_updated_at

last_updated_by_user_id.name: last_updated_by_user_id
last_updated_by_user_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `USER` who last updated the product area.

metadata.name: stg_pendo__guide_event
metadata.comment: Table capturing events related to guides. Each row is a unique event around `guideAdvanced`, `guideSeen`, `guideDismissed`, `guideSnoozed`, `guideTimeout`, `guideActivity`.

account_id.name: account_id
account_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `ACCOUNT` associated with the event triggerer, if any.

app_id.name: app_id
app_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `APPLICATION` the event was triggered in.

country.name: country
country.comment: Country in which the guide event was recorded.

guide_id.name: guide_id
guide_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `GUIDE` that was interacted with.

guide_step_id.name: guide_step_id
guide_step_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `STEP` within the guide that was interacted with specifically.

latitude.name: latitude
latitude.comment: Latitude of where the event was triggered from, if location is provided.

longitude.name: longitude
longitude.comment: Longitude of where the event was triggered from, if location is provided.

region.name: region
region.comment: Geographic region of the triggered event, if location is provided.

remote_ip.name: remote_ip
remote_ip.comment: IP Address of the event triggerer.

server_name.name: server_name
server_name.comment: Name of the server (your website) on which the event was tracked.

occurred_at.name: occurred_at
occurred_at.comment: Timestamp of when the event occurred.

type.name: type
type.comment: Type of guide event that was tracked. Can be one of `guideAdvanced`, `guideSeen`, `guideDismissed`, `guideSnoozed`, `guideTimeout`, `guideActivity`.

url.name: url
url.comment: URL on which the guide event was recorded.

user_agent.name: user_agent
user_agent.comment: String identifying the browser and operating system on which the event was triggered.

visitor_id.name: visitor_id
visitor_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `VISITOR` who triggered the event.

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: UTC timestamp that indicates the time when Fivetran last successfully synced the row.

metadata.name: stg_pendo__guide_history
metadata.comment: Table capturing historical records of guides in pendo.

app_id.name: app_id
app_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `APPLICATION` that the guide belongs in.

state.name: state
state.comment: The current state of the guide. published, staged, draft, and disabled.

device_type.name: device_type
device_type.comment: The current state of the guide - 'all', 'desktop', 'mobile'.

created_at.name: created_at
created_at.comment: Timestamp of when the guide was created.

created_by_user_id.name: created_by_user_id
created_by_user_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `USER` who created the guide.

is_multi_step.name: is_multi_step
is_multi_step.comment: Returns true if guide has multiple steps (walkthrough).

is_training.name: is_training
is_training.comment: Boolean that is true if the guide is for training.

last_updated_at.name: last_updated_at
last_updated_at.comment: Timestamp of when the guide was last updated.

last_updated_by_user_id.name: last_updated_by_user_id
last_updated_by_user_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `USER` who last updated the guide.

launch_method.name: launch_method
launch_method.comment: Activation method of the guide (ie auto, badge, dom).

published_at.name: published_at
published_at.comment: Timestamp of when the guide was officially published.

recurrence.name: recurrence
recurrence.comment: How frequent the guide is scheduled to recur.

recurrence_eligibility_window.name: recurrence_eligibility_window
recurrence_eligibility_window.comment: Eligible interval in which guides can be repeatedly activated.

reset_at.name: reset_at
reset_at.comment: Timestamp of when the guide was reset for visitors.

root_version_id.name: root_version_id
root_version_id.comment: The unique identifier of the root entity, which nominally matches the public id field of the guide.

stable_version_id.name: stable_version_id
stable_version_id.comment: The unique identifier for the current version of the guide.

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: UTC timestamp that indicates the time when Fivetran last successfully synced the row.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_pendo__guide_step_history
metadata.comment: Table associating guides with the steps they include.

guide_id.name: guide_id
guide_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `GUIDE` with steps.

guide_last_updated_at.name: guide_last_updated_at
guide_last_updated_at.comment: Timestamp of when the guide was last updated.

step_id.name: step_id
step_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `STEP` that the guide includes.

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: UTC timestamp that indicates the time when Fivetran last successfully synced the row.

metadata.name: stg_pendo__page_event
metadata.comment: Table capturing all recorded pageviews matching tagged pages. Contains custom columns passed through the `pendo__page_event_pass_through_columns` variable.

account_id.name: account_id
account_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `ACCOUNT` associated with the event, if any.

app_id.name: app_id
app_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `APPLICATION` that the event was tracked in.

num_events.name: num_events
num_events.comment: Number of pageviews matching tagged pages.

num_minutes.name: num_minutes
num_minutes.comment: Page time on site calculations are in 1 minute buckets. So if you are logged in to your app as a user (Pendo Visitor)  when you load a page’s URL, 1 minute time on site is calculated. Every time you click on that page, the time on site  calculation keeps running and totaling the successive minutes you’ve spent on that page. See https://support.pendo.io/hc/en-us/articles/360032203171-How-is-Site-Page-Interaction-Calculated-.

page_id.name: page_id
page_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `PAGE` being loaded.

remote_ip.name: remote_ip
remote_ip.comment: The IP address of the event triggerer.

server_name.name: server_name
server_name.comment: Name of the server (your website) on which the event was tracked.

occurred_at.name: occurred_at
occurred_at.comment: Day/hour-part timestamp of when the event occurred.

user_agent.name: user_agent
user_agent.comment: String identifying the browser and operating system on which the event was triggered.

visitor_id.name: visitor_id
visitor_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `VISITOR` who triggered the event.

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: UTC timestamp that indicates the time when Fivetran last successfully synced the row.

_fivetran_id.name: _fivetran_id
_fivetran_id.comment: Fivetran created id hashed on the `param_*` fields.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_pendo__page_history
metadata.comment: Table capturing the historical records of pages tagged in Pendo.

page_name.name: page_name
page_name.comment: Name of the page as displayed in Pendo.

app_id.name: app_id
app_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `APPLICATION` that the page is associated with.

created_at.name: created_at
created_at.comment: Timestamp of when the page was first created.

created_by_user_id.name: created_by_user_id
created_by_user_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `USER` who created the page.

is_dirty.name: is_dirty
is_dirty.comment: Boolean value returned if page is processing at the time of request.

group_id.name: group_id
group_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `GROUP` (product area) that the page is tagged under.

last_updated_at.name: last_updated_at
last_updated_at.comment: Timestamp of when the page was updated.

last_updated_by_user_id.name: last_updated_by_user_id
last_updated_by_user_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `USER` who last updated the page.

root_version_id.name: root_version_id
root_version_id.comment: The unique identifier of the root entity, which nominally matches the public id field of the page.

stable_version_id.name: stable_version_id
stable_version_id.comment: The unique identifier for the current version of the page.

valid_through.name: valid_through
valid_through.comment: Timestamp that indicates when data was last processed.

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: UTC timestamp that indicates the time when Fivetran last successfully synced the row.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_pendo__page_rule_history
metadata.comment: Table capturing historical records of rules associated with pages.

designer_hint.name: designer_hint
designer_hint.comment: String of what the page's url will look like, including site domain.

page_id.name: page_id
page_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `PAGE` that the rule pertains to.

page_last_updated_at.name: page_last_updated_at
page_last_updated_at.comment: Timestamp of when the page was last updated at.

parsed_rule.name: parsed_rule
parsed_rule.comment: The url rule of the page, completely parsed out.

rule.name: rule
rule.comment: Bare-bones URL rule of the page.

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: UTC timestamp that indicates the time when Fivetran last successfully synced the row.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_pendo__poll
metadata.comment: Table capturing polls administered via Pendo.

attribute_display.name: attribute_display
attribute_display.comment: Type of way to answer (ie select, radio, null for freeform answers).

follow_up_poll_id.name: follow_up_poll_id
follow_up_poll_id.comment: Self-referencing id of the follow-up `POLL` question, if any.

attribute_max_length.name: attribute_max_length
attribute_max_length.comment: Max length for the answer, if any.

question.name: question
question.comment: The content of the poll question.

reset_at.name: reset_at
reset_at.comment: The timestamp when the poll's data was last reset.

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: UTC timestamp that indicates the time when Fivetran last successfully synced the row.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_pendo__poll_event
metadata.comment: Table capturing individual responses to polls.

account_id.name: account_id
account_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `ACCOUNT` associated with the event, if any.

app_id.name: app_id
app_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `APPLICATION` that the event was tracked in.

country.name: country
country.comment: Country in which the poll event was recorded.

guide_id.name: guide_id
guide_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `GUIDE` that the poll is a part of.

guide_step_id.name: guide_step_id
guide_step_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `GUIDE_STEP` that the poll is a part of.

latitude.name: latitude
latitude.comment: Latitude of where the event was triggered from, if location is provided.

longitude.name: longitude
longitude.comment: Longitude of where the event was triggered from, if location is provided.

poll_id.name: poll_id
poll_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `POLL` that the event was in response to.

poll_response.name: poll_response
poll_response.comment: Depending on the kind of poll, the content of the poll response. For ratings, this will be an integer, and for freeform text responses, this will be the content. For pick-lists, this will be an ID that does not point anywhere....

region.name: region
region.comment: Geographic region of the triggered event, if location is provided.

remote_ip.name: remote_ip
remote_ip.comment: IP Address of the event triggerer.

server_name.name: server_name
server_name.comment: Name of the server (your website) on which the event was tracked.

occurred_at.name: occurred_at
occurred_at.comment: Timestamp of when the poll event was triggered.

type.name: type
type.comment: Type of guide event that was tracked. This table only captures poll responses.

url.name: url
url.comment: URL on which the poll response was recorded.

user_agent.name: user_agent
user_agent.comment: String identifying the browser and operating system on which the event was triggered.

visitor_id.name: visitor_id
visitor_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `VISITOR` who triggered the event.

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: UTC timestamp that indicates the time when Fivetran last successfully synced the row.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_pendo__visitor_history
metadata.comment: Table capturing historical records of visitors.

account_id.name: account_id
account_id.comment: Foreign key referencing the `ACCOUNT` associated with this visitor. Visitors can belong to multiple accounts, however. Refer to `VISITOR_ACCOUNT_HISTORY` for all accounts associated with individual visitors.

first_visit_at.name: first_visit_at
first_visit_at.comment: Timestamp of when an event was first captured for the visitor.

last_updated_at.name: last_updated_at
last_updated_at.comment: Timestamp of when the visitor was last updated.

last_visit.name: last_visit
last_visit.comment: Timestamp of the user's last visit.

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
